heroTitle: AI machine vision for quality control and waste reduction in food processing
heroSubtitle: Cameras and neural networks inspect every maize grain on the production line, while IoT sensors watch the machines themselves. A 24-month research project in Rwanda and Malawi.
aboutText: Workers check maize by eye for mold, discoloration and foreign objects. The method is slow, inconsistent, and misses the contamination that matters most. Aflatoxin, a toxic mold, is linked to liver disease and weakened immunity.
